first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same. The minor differences in wording and ordering of points are well within the bounds of ordinary run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate. The model did not react to the change in job locations from various international cities to a generic "United States".
